case_title: BENJAMIN HOBSON VS. WAYNE EMERSON LOVE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY AND TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON WAYNE EMERSON LOVE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOBSON, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-01-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT(S) WAYNE EMERSON LOVE AND ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK ARE NOT PRESENT. RETRUN CERTIFIED SERVICE WAS NOT SIGNED. PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO WAYNE EMERSON LOVE FILED UNTIMELY. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED LESS THAN 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN HOBSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAYNE EMERSON LOVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOBSON, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $34.50) SERVED SEP-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOVE, WAYNE EMERSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,782.00 FILED BY HOBSON, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT LOVE, WAYNE EMERSON ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOBSON, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOVE, WAYNE EMERSON ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY $4,782.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,862.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
